Container.Name: magguuui-website

Branch.TagDescription: Stable build from main (auto-published by GitHub Actions)

Container.Overview: Public website + admin panel + REST API for WoW UI import strings (ElvUI, Plater, BigWigs, Details, etc.). Nuxt 4 + SQLite (WAL) + Drizzle. Runs headless behind a reverse proxy / Cloudflare Tunnel. Live: ui.magguu.xyz.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port of the Nuxt server. Expose to your reverse proxy / Cloudflare Tunnel, not the public internet.

Config.Name: AppData (SQLite)
Config.Description: SQLite database + WAL files. Persists across container rebuilds.

Config.Name: Uploads
Config.Description: Admin-uploaded files (logos, OG overrides, etc.). Persists across container rebuilds.

Config.Name: NUXT_JWT_SECRET
Config.Description: JWT signing key. Generate 64 random chars: openssl rand -hex 32. Changing it invalidates all existing sessions.

Config.Name: NUXT_ADMIN_PASSWORD
Config.Description: First admin password (bcrypt-hashed on first startup). Can be changed via admin UI after login. Set NUXT_FORCE_PASSWORD_RESET=true to reset to this value on next boot.

Config.Name: NUXT_WEBAUTHN_RP_ID
Config.Description: Passkey relying-party ID. Must be the hostname users access (no protocol, no port). Required for passkeys in production — they fail silently if wrong.

Config.Name: NUXT_WEBAUTHN_ORIGIN
Config.Description: Passkey origin. Full URL incl. https://. Required for passkeys in production.

Config.Name: NUXT_API_KEY
Config.Description: External API key for GitHub Actions / CI calling the website's API. Leave empty if not used.

Config.Name: NUXT_GITHUB_TOKEN
Config.Description: GitHub Personal Access Token with read+write access to NUXT_GITHUB_REPO. Used for content sync (addon CHANGELOG).

Config.Name: NUXT_GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET
Config.Description: HMAC secret for /api/v1/webhooks/github signature verification. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: NUXT_SYNC_SEEDED_CONTENT
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to re-sync default home/guide/FAQ content on every startup. Leave empty for one-time seed only.

Config.Name: NUXT_FORCE_PASSWORD_RESET
Config.Description: Set to 'true' ONCE to force-reset the admin password to NUXT_ADMIN_PASSWORD on next boot. Unset afterwards.

Config.Name: HOST
Config.Description: Interface the Nuxt server binds to.

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: Internal port of the Nuxt server (must match the WebUI Port above).
